                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_fighters_y1912 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_fighter1 - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_fighter1b - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_fighter1b }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_fighter1b = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_fighter1 - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_fighter1b - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_fighter1b }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_fighter1b = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_fakefighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_fakefighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_fakefighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_fakefighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            set_technology = { aa_cannon_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }

# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_medium_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        # bba_heavy_fighter1 - 1936

                NOT = { has_tech = bba_heavy_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_medium_airframe - 1940

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_fighter2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_fighter2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_heavy_fighter2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_heavy_fighter2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_heavy_fighter2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_medium_airframe - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_heavy_fighter3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) --

# ww1_seaplane1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_ww1_seaplane1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# ww1_seaplane2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_ww1_seaplane2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# bba_naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1915 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_seaplane1 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_seaplane1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_seaplane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_seaplane1 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_seaplane1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_seaplane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (20 techs) --

# ww1_zeppelin1
#   year=1912 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_ww1_zeppelin1
#   year=1912 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_zeppelin2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_ww1_zeppelin2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# bba_strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

# bba_jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[jet_engines]

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1912 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1912 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_zeppelin1 - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_zeppelin1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_zeppelin1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_zeppelin1 - 1912
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_zeppelin1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_zeppelin1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # jet_strategic_bomber1 - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_tech = jet_engines
            }
            set_technology = { jet_strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_jet_strategic_bomber1 - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_jet_strategic_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_tech = jet_engines
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_jet_strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (20 techs) --

# ww1_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber1
#   year=1915 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber2
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber3
#   year=1919 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_bomber4
#   year=1927 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_ww1_bomber4
#   year=1927 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# bba_jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# bba_jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1919 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1927 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1915 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_bomber1 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_bomber1 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
                has_tech = jet_engines
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }

        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 - 1950

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # strategic_airlifter - 1948

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1903 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1903 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1907 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1907 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # chemical_research - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = chemical_research }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { chemical_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1907 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # hoi4tgw_decryption - 1907
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = hoi4tgw_decryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1907 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { hoi4tgw_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # hoi4tgw_encryption - 1907
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = hoi4tgw_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1907 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_radio - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_radio }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_computing_machine - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_computing_machine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_encryption - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_encryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_encryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_decryption - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_decryption }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_decryption = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1919 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1931 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1931 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_medicine1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_medicine1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_medicine1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_fortification1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_fortification1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_fortification1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_tools1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_tools1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_tools1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_oil1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_oil1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_oil1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_camera1 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_camera1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_camera1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1931 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_medicine7 - 1931
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_medicine7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1931 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_medicine7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_fortification4c - 1931
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_fortification4c }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1931 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            set_technology = { ww1_fortification4c = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_construction5 - 1931

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1931 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # excavation3 - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining4 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { assembly_line_production = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # concentrated_industry4 - 1941

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            set_technology = { concentrated_industry4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # construction4 - 1941

                NOT = { has_tech = construction4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
