arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fuel_refining5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fuel_refining5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = streamlined_line }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { streamlined_line = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # dispersed_industry5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_oil_plant - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_oil_plant }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_oil_plant = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # construction5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # excavation5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # atomic_research - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            set_technology = { thermonuclear_bombs = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (6 techs) --

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_cavity_magnatron
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # radio_detection - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (15 techs) --

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery4
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# jet_engines
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# improved_rocket_engines
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# advanced_rocket_engines
#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { experimental_rockets = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }

            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_rocket_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # rocket_engines - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_engines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_engines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # jet_engines - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jet_engines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { jet_engines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber - 1945

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

# -- LAND / ANTI_AIR (9 techs) --

# antiair_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1943 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1915 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # antiair_1915 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1915 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            }
            set_technology = { antiair_1915 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    }

# -- LAND / ANTI_TANK (13 techs) --

# antitank_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# photo_reconnaisance
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_centrifugal_jet_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1915 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # antitank_1915 - 1915
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1915 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { antitank_1915 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { photo_reconnaisance = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # antitank_1922 - 1922

                NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1922 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { antitank_1922 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mountain_tanks - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { mountain_tanks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { SWE_bofors_antitank_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # interwar_antitank - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { interwar_antitank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # sp_centrifugal_jet_tech - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_centrifugal_jet_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_centrifugal_jet_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / ARTILLERY (30 techs) --

# light_field_gun1
#   year=1900 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun1
#   year=1900 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha1
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha4
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery1
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery4
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun2
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# light_field_gun2
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha2
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery2
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery_global
#   year=1918 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_heavy_artillery
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha3
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_dp_light_battery
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # light_field_gun1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_field_gun1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { light_field_gun1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_field_gun1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_field_gun1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        # artillery5 - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = artillery5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { artillery5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # advanced_dp_light_battery - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_dp_light_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_dp_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (33 techs) --

# ww1_heavy_tank
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_unlocker2]

# ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[gwtank__nostepback, tank_unlocker2__nostepback]

# ww1_heavy_tank2
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar__nostepback
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_td
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_art
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_spaa
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_td
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_art
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_spaa
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_td
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_art
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_spaa
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_td
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_art
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_spaa
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1928 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1928 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1916 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_tank - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1917 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_tank2 - 1917

                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_tank2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_super_heavy_tank - 1917

                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_super_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_tank_chassis - 1934

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_heavy_tank - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_heavy_td - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_heavy_art - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_heavy_spaa - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
