# elite_forces
#   year=1944 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_ww1_machinegun4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1945 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1919 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1921 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1924 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1927 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_binoculars - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_binoculars }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_binoculars = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_ambulance1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_ambulance1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_ambulance1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1infantry_weapons1 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1infantry_weapons1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_grenade - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_grenade }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_grenade = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # marines - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_mountaineers - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1_infantry_equip1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry_equip1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_infantry_equip1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_gasmask - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_gasmask }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_gasmask = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons2 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_ambulance2 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_ambulance2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_ambulance2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1916 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1infantry_weapons2 - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_ww1_machinegun1 - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_machinegun1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_ww1_machinegun1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_ww1_mortar1 - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_mortar1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_ww1_mortar1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_infantry2_equip - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry2_equip }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_infantry2_equip = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_flamethrower1 - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_flamethrower1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_flamethrower1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # marines2 - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_mountaineers2 - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons3 - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1919 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1_infantry_equip2 - 1919
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry_equip2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_infantry_equip2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_ww1_machinegun2 - 1919
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_machinegun2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_ww1_machinegun2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons1919 - 1919
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons1919 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons1919 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1921 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921 - 1921
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1infantry_weapons_interwar1921 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons_interwar1 - 1921
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons_interwar1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons_interwar1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1924 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        # infantry_ww1_mortar2 - 1924

                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_mortar2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_ww1_mortar2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons_interwar2 - 1924
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons_interwar2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons_interwar2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1927 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1_transport_plane - 1927
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_ww1_transport_plane - 1927
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_ww1_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1infantry_weapons3 - 1927
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1infantry_weapons3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons_interwar3 - 1927
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons_interwar3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons_interwar3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1930 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # ww1_infantry_equip3 - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry_equip3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_infantry_equip3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_flamethrower2 - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_flamethrower2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_flamethrower2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons4 - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # paratroopers - 1930
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
                has_tech = ww1_transport_plane
            }
            set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        }

        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_expeditionary_support

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # tech_special_forces - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_weapons2 - 1938

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_ww1_mortar3 - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_mortar3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_td
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_art
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_spaa
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_td
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_art
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_spaa
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1913 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1928 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1928 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gwtank - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # gwtank__nostepback - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1913 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_armored_car_2 - 1913
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback - 1913
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_3 = 1 popup = no }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1917 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_light_tank_b - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_b }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_tank_b = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_tank - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_tank__nostepback - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_tank__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # gwtank_chassis - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_armored_car_4 - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_spaa - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_tank_chassis - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }

# -- LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) --

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised

#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_art
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_art
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_spaa
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_td
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_art
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_spaa
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_medium_spaa - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_medium_tank - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_medium_td - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_medium_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_medium_art - 1941

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_medium_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_medium_spaa - 1941

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { improved_medium_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

            set_technology = { modern_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) --

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # main_battle_tank - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # main_battle_tank_chassis - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MOTORISED (7 techs) --

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1900 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_motorised
#   year=1914 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension1
#   year=1919 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension2
#   year=1921 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension3
#   year=1927 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1919 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1921 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1927 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_motorised_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # motorised_infantry - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorised_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / SUPPORT (64 techs) --
