#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1927 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1946 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_support - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_train - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_train }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_recon - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_recon = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_military_police - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_field_hospital - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_logistics_company - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_signal_company - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = radio
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers2 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_recon2 - 1914

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_field_hospital2 - 1914

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_logistics_company2 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_signal_company2 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_armored_train - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_train }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_armored_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_train - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { basic_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers3 - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_recon3 - 1918
        if = {

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            }
            set_technology = { wartime_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_engineers7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_engineers7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_recon7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_recon7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_military_police7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_field_hospital7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_logistics_company7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_signal_company7 - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital8 = 1 popup = no }

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company8 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = night_vision2 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1927 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_maintenance_company - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { tank_unlocker2__nostepback = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # armor_tech_1 - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engine_tech_1 - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
                has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (55 techs) --

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1906 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_battleship0_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship0_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_navalmodule_1890 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1890 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1890 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # heavy_navalmodule_1900_mtg - 1900

                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1900_mtg }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1900_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship1_mtg - 1900

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship1_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_navalmodule_1900 - 1900

                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1900 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1900 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship1 - 1900

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1910_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship3_mtg - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship3_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship3_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battlecruiser1 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battlecruiser1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battlecruiser1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_navalmodule_1910 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1910 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_navalmodule_1910 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship3 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_battlecruiser2_mtg - 1914

                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battlecruiser2_mtg }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battlecruiser2_mtg = 1 popup = no }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ship_hull_super_heavy - 1936

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
        # basic_battleship_mtg - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battleship_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship_mtg - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_battleship - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            }
            set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_battleship_mtg - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_battleship_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_battlecruiser - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_battleship - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_heavy - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_battleship_mtg - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_battleship_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship2_mtg - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship2_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_battleship - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship2 - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (18 techs) --

# seaplane_carrier_mtg
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# seaplane_carrier
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier_mtg
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier_mtg
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier_mtg
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier_mtg
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier_mtg
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # seaplane_carrier_mtg - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = seaplane_carrier_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { seaplane_carrier_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # seaplane_carrier - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = seaplane_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { seaplane_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sp_ice_composite_runawayas - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_ice_composite_runawayas = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_carrier - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_carrier_mtg - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_carrier_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_carrier - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
