#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1906 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_destroyer0_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer0_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_destroyer0_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_destroyer0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer0 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer5_mtg }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_destroyer5_mtg = 1 popup = no }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_destroyer5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_light - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # smoke_generator - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
        # sonar - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_destroyer_mtg - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_destroyer - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_light_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_light_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_light_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser_mtg
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1906 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1890_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1890_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_cruiser0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_cruiser0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1890 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1890 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1890 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1890 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1890 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1890 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1900_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1900_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1900_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_heavy_cruiser1 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_heavy_cruiser1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1900 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1900 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1900 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1900 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1900 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1900 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1906 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser2_mtg - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser2_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser2_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1906_mtg - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1906_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1906_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1906_mtg - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1906_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1906_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_coastal_submarine1_mtg - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_coastal_submarine1_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_coastal_submarine1_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_light_cruiser2 - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_light_cruiser2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # medium_navalmodule_1906 - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1906 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { medium_navalmodule_1906 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # light_navalmodule_1906 - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1906 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { light_navalmodule_1906 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_coastal_submarine1 - 1906
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_coastal_submarine1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_coastal_submarine1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            }

        }
        # early_light_cruiser_mtg - 1922
        if = {

                NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_light_cruiser_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_heavy_cruiser_mtg - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_light_cruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_heavy_cruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_cruiser_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_cruiser - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_cruiser - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / NAVAL_SUPPORT (26 techs) --

# ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   year=1890 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   year=1900 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   year=1945 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_moduleMTG_mines - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_moduleMTG_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_moduleMTG_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # transport_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = transport_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { transport_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # transport - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = transport }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            }
            set_technology = { transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # airdrop_mines_bba - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines_bba }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airdrop_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (26 techs) --

# ww1_submarine0_mtg
#   year=1900 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine0
#   year=1900 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine1_mtg
#   year=1906 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine1
#   year=1906 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine2_mtg
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine2
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine3_mtg
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine3
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine4_mtg
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ww1_submarine4
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine_mtg
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_mtg
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_mtg
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_submarine_mtg
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1906 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_submarine0_mtg - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_submarine0_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_submarine0 - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_submarine0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_submarine - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
        # advanced_submarine_mtg - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine_mtg }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_submarine_mtg = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_submarine - 1944
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (0 techs) --
arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    # No techs matched this category.
}
